mnemonics: My Very Patient Father Just Made Us Nachos Promptly
keyPoints: The block header contains the metadata for a block.
It is a unique digital fingerprint (hash) of the block's contents.
Miners compete to solve a cryptographic puzzle based on this header.
commonMistakes: Confusing the Merkle Root (transactions) with the Previous Hash (blockchain link).
Thinking the Nonce is a complex number; it's simply an integer incremented to find a valid hash.
